title: Designing a monitoring strategy for a new GPU partition
query_text: We are planning to add 16 A100 GPU nodes to the cluster. What monitoring metrics, alert thresholds, and telemetry cadence should we configure for this partition based on current cluster behaviour?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Based on current GPU partition (48 nodes, 97% utilization): configure per-GPU metrics at 30s cadence (gpu_util_pct, gpu_mem_used_gb, gpu_temp_c, nccl_throughput_gb_s). Alert thresholds: gpu_temp > 85C WARNING / > 90C CRITICAL; gpu_util < 20% for > 30min on allocated node = idle waste alert; ECC correctable > 50/24h = predictive failure trigger. NVLink bandwidth monitoring for multi-GPU jobs. IB fabric congestion counters at 60s cadence.
